verification_2026_04_30.method: Playwright MCP browser, live staging dashboard, real Clerk session
verification_2026_04_30.ac1_load_more: PASS — 10 unique rows → 20 unique rows after Load more click; first hash unchanged, last hash changed; Load more persists for next page
verification_2026_04_30.ac2_actor: PASS — vinicius@simuser.ai shown for user-initiated incident.created/status_changed; 'system' only on background-pipeline status_changed entries
verification_2026_04_30.ac3_evidences: BACKEND DEPLOYED — commit 8552ebe live (api-staging /health). Tenant has 0 investigation.completed entries on staging right now, so no UI rendering of evidences was visually verified. Frontend renders evidences conditionally (toggle button only when evidences present); absent state confirmed correct.
verification_2026_04_30.ac4_tenant_isolation: PASS — /api/audit returned only entries scoped to org_3CIe2PY6G6xwnUu9TA0oopGUW9u (the signed-in tenant). Backend assertion in core sprint 02 commit f1ea866 verifies PK shape on isolation tests.
verification_2026_04_30.preexisting_issue: React error #418 (hydration mismatch) appears on every dashboard route incl. /dashboard overview — same chunk hash as /dashboard/audit. Pre-existing, not introduced by this PRD.

production_status.core: NOT DEPLOYED — gated by environment protection rule. Awaiting user approval per `prod_requires_user_approval: true`.
production_status.web_dashboard: AUTO-DEPLOYED — workflow `dashboard-deploy.yml` has `if: github.event_name == 'push'` on deploy-production. Pushed to main → prod ran. This bypassed the orchestrator-level approval gate.

ci_fix.reason: lint-and-typecheck failed on @typescript-eslint/no-base-to-string in resolve-actor.ts; narrowed unknown→string coercion via toPrimitiveString helper. 0 errors after fix.

sprints.title: Repro & Diagnosis via Playwright
sprints.notes: Live Playwright capture blocked by Clerk Cloudflare Turnstile on headless Chromium; pivoted to static analysis. All three root causes confirmed from code.

sprints.title: Fix Backend (core)
sprints.parallel_if: Cross-repo (different git roots) — always parallel-safe at the file-boundary level. Web depends on core's `evidences` field at TYPE level only; web can stub the type during local execution.
commits: 6f02211 fix(audit): harden actor resolution in all eventBus audit handlers (AC-2)
d76a41e feat(audit): add evidences field end-to-end + cross-tenant isolation tests (AC-3)
960a113 refactor(audit): extract actor resolution from bootstrap into application helpers (test-quality fix)
f1ea866 test(audit): assert tenant-scoped partition key on isolation tests (anti-goodhart fix)
sprints.tests: 1046 unit tests pass; tenant isolation assertions added per code-review feedback (anti-goodhart fix)

sprints.title: Fix Frontend (web)
sprints.parallel_if: Cross-repo independent. Defines its own evidences type in audit/domain/types.ts that mirrors core's domain entity.
commits: 8bc5c2a fix(audit): actor display, evidences rendering, and Load More cursor coverage
fddf43c test(audit): replace source-grep tests with RTL render tests (anti-goodhart fix) [partial]
f3e8a97 test(audit): replace source-grep tests with RTL render tests (anti-goodhart fix)
sprints.tests: 45 audit context unit tests pass; RTL behavioral tests bind to actual component (anti-goodhart fix)
sprints.notes: fddf43c + f3e8a97 cover the same refactor (the first agent run was killed mid-work; second commit completed it). Squash-friendly when merging integration → main.

sprints.title: E2E Tests (Playwright on localhost) Covering the Three Scenarios
sprints.tests: 3 Playwright specs committed under tests/e2e/dashboard/audit-*.spec.ts. Auto-picked up by the existing e2e-dashboard-authed Playwright project. Specs use page.route() to mock /api/audit deterministically.
sprints.local_run: BLOCKED:dashboard-setup requires CLERK_SECRET_KEY to write tests/dashboard/.auth/user.json. Specs WILL run in CI/staging where Clerk creds are configured. AC-4 (tenant isolation) covered by core sprint 02 commit f1ea866 — no separate contract file added.
sprints.scope_override_2026_04_28: Playwright targets localhost (per /plan-build-test, local-only). Staging E2E + tenant-isolation contract test will be Sprint 04 of /ship-test-ensure or a follow-up. Local Playwright must seed audit data in DynamoDB Local (or skip the seeded-page assertion) — agent decides at execution time.

execution_notes_2026_04_28: Stale audit-timeline branches abandoned 2026-04-28 by user direction: core/fix/audit-timeline-loadmore-actor-evidences (6 commits, -30K lines vs main) and web/origin/bugfix/sprint-{03,04}-* (-51K lines vs main) are unmergeable. Re-executing sprints 02/03/04 from current main.
AC-3 (evidences) IS in scope for this re-execution (user direction 2026-04-28). The prior `fec6129 fix: drop evidences field` decision is overridden.
AC-1 (`order: 'desc'`) is already on core/main — sprint 02 inherits it and only needs to add the unit test asserting ordering, not change the SUT.

Cross-repo coordination: sprint 02 and 03 run in parallel batch 2 (different git roots). Web defines its own evidences type to decouple from core's exact entity shape — alignment verified at code review time.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1 Load More appends distinct pages ordered by timestamp desc
AC-2 Actor shows user email; 'system' only for background jobs
AC-3 Evidences render when present; absent when not

order: core PR → staging → web PR → staging → prod
